message:
Fix offset wording in kafka.mdx

Use "read from" instead of "read at" for offset descriptions.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -26,8 +26,8 @@ from_kafka "topic", offset="beginning"
 this = message.parse_json()
 ```
 
-Additional offset values are `"end"` to read at the last offset, `"stored"` to
-read at the stored offset, a positive integer representing an absolute offset,
+Additional offset values are `"end"` to read from the last offset, `"stored"` to
+read from the stored offset, a positive integer representing an absolute offset,
 or a negative integer representing a relative offset counting from the end.
 
 ### Send events to a Kafka topic
